140.label: FP
140.issue: Use of weak SHA1 hash for security. Consider usedforsecurity=False
140.reasoning: Heuristic mis-applied. This alert is bandit's SHA1 weak-hash warning at line 71 (hashlib.sha1(data).hexdigest()) for an RSA sign/verify get_hash helper, NOT a DUO133 Crypto.* import alert. The pycrypto pin is irrelevant to this finding; swapping to pycryptodome would not remove the SHA1 use. On merits the SHA1-for-signatures concern is real, but the repo is a single-commit 2012-2013 abandoned wrapper with no consumers, so even the underlying SHA1 issue is non-actionable; pin rule does not justify the TP.
